productDisplayName: Nike Men Tempo Navy Blue Shorts
description: CompositionNavy blue shorts made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has built-in brief, an elasticated waist with drawstrings, grey and orange stripe detailing with mesh panels along the sides and nike swoosh printed on the left legFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron, do not iron on decorationsBuilt with the breathable comfort and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike training shorts come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance shorts features Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the skin and keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with a T-shirt, tracksuit jacket and running shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M, length 15” on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
